resources.string: Rebuilds trends from real cycles and symptoms
Notify the start of estimated periods and the start of fertility with an adapted prevention message.
Allow Android notifications to receive important reminders.
Exports a shareable backup of your data.
Unable to create the backup directory.
Imports a FlowBerry backup and replaces the current data.
The selected file is not a valid FlowBerry backup.
Unable to open the backup file.
FlowBerry is designed to work locally on your device, without sending your personal data to a remote server by default.
1. Processed data\n\nFlowBerry lets you locally record menstrual cycle dates, symptoms, notes, and some display or notification preferences.
2. Data storage\n\nData is stored locally on the user device. By default, FlowBerry does not use a remote server to store personal data.
3. Data sharing\n\nFlowBerry does not sell, rent, or share personal or health data with third parties.
4. Export and import\n\nThe application may allow exporting or importing a backup file. This action is triggered only by the user.
5. Notifications\n\nIf notifications are enabled, FlowBerry may create local reminders on the device. No health data is sent to a remote service to generate those reminders.
6. Permissions\n\nFlowBerry may request permissions strictly necessary for its features, such as notifications or rescheduling reminders after reboot.
7. Security\n\nData remains on the device. Actual security also depends on protections enabled on the phone, such as passcode, biometrics, or encryption.
8. Intended use\n\nFlowBerry is a personal tracking tool. The application is not a medical device and does not replace advice from a healthcare professional.
9. Source code\n\nThe FlowBerry code may be made public as part of an open source approach. This does not include user personal data.
10. Data deletion\n\nThe user can delete data in the application or by uninstalling the application, subject to Android system backup mechanisms.
11. Contact\n\nFor any privacy related question, contact the application publisher at the address you will publish on the Play Store listing and in your online privacy policy.
